title: Invisible Wheel / Arms / Car / Map but can still hear sound

messages.content: # "Why does my car look like a convertible?” or "Why does my car look like it is cut in half?" If that is you, follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Settings > Custom Shader Patch > Graphic Adjustments
> Make sure you have the same exact values or [CLICK TO APPLY SETTINGS](https://acstuff.ru/s/q_zMVw)
